confirmations.startOver: Are you sure you want to start over? This will clear all your data.

checkInput.title: Add Your Check Items
checkInput.subtitle: Start by adding items manually or upload a receipt image
checkInput.uploadDescription: Drag and drop or click to upload
checkInput.uploadInstructions: Upload a photo of your receipt and we'll extract the items automatically (mock OCR for demo purposes)
checkInput.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
checkInput.fileTypes: PNG, JPG, or HEIC up to 10MB
checkInput.noItemsDescription: Add items manually or upload a receipt image to get started

people.title: Add People
people.subtitle: Add at least 2 people who are splitting the check
people.noPeopleDescription: Add people who are splitting the check
people.minPeopleWarning: Please add at least 2 people to continue

assignment.title: Assign Items to People
assignment.subtitle: Drag items to assign them. You can assign items to multiple people to split the cost.
assignment.allItemsAssignedDescription: Great! All items have been assigned to people
assignment.dragItemsHere: Drag items here to assign them
assignment.tipMessage: Tip: Drag items from the unassigned pool to assign them to people. You can assign the same item to multiple people to split the cost evenly between them.

summary.title: Split Summary
summary.subtitle: Here's how the check is split among everyone
summary.noItemsAssigned: No items assigned to this person
summary.unassignedWarningMessage: Some items haven't been assigned to anyone yet. They won't be included in the split calculation.
summary.noPeopleToSplit: No people to split the check
summary.noPeopleDescription: Please add people in the previous step to see the split

errors.invalidPrice: Please enter a valid price greater than 0
errors.processingFailed: Failed to process image. Please try again.
errors.invalidFileType: Please upload a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, HEIC)
errors.fileTooLarge: Image size must be less than 10MB

footer.builtWith: Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion
